_meta.purpose: Trust-building sentences in Hinglish. References doctor behavior, staff, clinic environment. Written like real patient observations.
rules: Use 'doctor sahab' or 'sir' naturally — common Indian respectful reference
Mention sunna (listening), samjhana (explaining), time dena — real patient values
Mix formal respect with casual sentence structure
Feel like someone telling a friend about their experience

5star: Doctor sahab ne bahut dhyan se suna, bilkul rush nahi kiya.
Har cheez itni clearly samjhayi ki koi confusion hi nahi bachi.
Staff bahut cooperative hai, koi attitude nahi bilkul.
Doctor ne puri history poochi aur tabhi treatment decide ki — yeh bahut kam hota hai.
Dawa kya hai, kyun de rahe hain, kab leni hai — sab explain kiya properly.
Doosri visit pe bhi doctor ko mera case yaad tha, impressed ho gaya.
Is clinic mein patients ko time milta hai — aajkal yeh rare ho gaya hai.
Kabhi bhi call karke pooch sako, staff helpful hai.
Clinic ka environment bahut calm hai, anxiety feel nahi hoti andar jaake.
Doctor sahab ka attitude bahut patient-friendly hai.
Mere saare questions ka jawab diya, ek bhi ignore nahi kiya.
Sirf dawa nahi di — puri lifestyle ke baare mein bhi guide kiya.
Reception pe bhi bahut accha behaviour hai — yeh bhi matter karta hai.
Treatment kitna chalega, kya expect karein — sab pehle hi bata diya.
Sachchi baat karte hain, koi false promises nahi karte.
Dr. Verma pehle doctor hain jinki pehli dose se hi fark feel hua.
Unhone sirf dawa nahi di — poori baat samjhayi ki kyun hoga aur kab tak hoga.
Itna confidence tha unhe apni treatment pe — woh confidence sahi nikla.
Dr. Verma ne pehle din hi bola stone nikal jayega, operation nahi chahiye. Sach nikla.
Stone ke itne cases handle kiye hain inhone ki baat karte hi pata chal jata hai experience ka.
Doosre doctors vague rehte the. Dr. Verma ne exactly bataya kya hoga aur kab hoga.
London se PG kiya hai, MD hai — qualification bhi hai aur experience bhi. Combination rare hai.
4star: Doctor ne dhyan se suna aur treatment bataya.
Staff ka behaviour acha tha visit ke dauran.
Consultation mein doctor ne sab theek se explain kiya.
Clinic clean hai aur environment comfortable hai.
Doctor ko apna kaam pata hai, yeh feel hota hai.
Mere questions pe properly respond kiya doctor ne.
Waiting time zyada nahi tha, yeh accha laga.
3star: Dawa di gayi consultation ke baad.
